---
title: "Project 1(Plastic)"
author: "Tyler Kinney, Greyson Ballesteros"
format: 
  html:
    code-tools: true
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
    theme: journal
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-title: "Contents"
editor: source
execute:
  echo: true
  error: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: packages-setup
library(tidyverse)
library(glue)
library(here)
library(jsonlite)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggridges)
```

### Research Question 1

RQ: Has the types of plastics that are being used changed significantly from 2019 to 2020?

## Data Context

```{r}
#| label: load_data
tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load('2021-01-26')
plastics <- tuesdata$plastics
```

## Summary Tables

hello

## Data Visualizations




### Research Question 2




## Data Context


## Summary Tables


## Data Visualizations
